news.t: Horizon Kinetics Launches Japan Owner Operator Exchange-Traded Fund (Ticker: JAPN)

holdings.infoBox: JAPN is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Furuno Electric stock at 8.83%, Japan Elevator Service Holdings at 4.81%, M&A Capital Partners at 4.54%, Resorttrust at 4.50%, and FURYU at 4.42%.

overview.description: The Horizon Kinetics Japan Owner Operator ETF (JAPN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in a portfolio of Japanese companies that are owner-operated, or whose owners have significant stakes in their companies. The fund seeks long-term capital growth. JAPN was launched on May 12, 2025 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: Horizon Kinetics Launches Japan Owner Operator Exchange-Traded Fund (Ticker: JAPN)
data.text: NEW YORK CITY, NY / ACCESS Newswire / May 13, 2025 / Horizon Kinetics LLC announced the launch of its sixth exchange-traded fund (ETF), the actively managed Japan Owner Operator ETF (NASDAQ:JAPN). It ...
